title: AGRICULTURAL EDUCATION
doc_html:
SUBPART A-2.  AGRICULTURAL EDUCATION

§185.1.  Short title

This Subpart shall be known as the "Agricultural Education Act".

Acts 2001, No. 339, §1, eff. June 7, 2001.
